entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Oryza sativa L., the crop being studied for starch properties

entities.name: STARCH
entities.description: Complex carbohydrate composed of amylose and amylopectin that influences rice quality

entities.name: AMYLOSE
entities.description: A linear polymer of glucose and a component of starch

entities.name: AMYLOPECTIN
entities.description: A branched polymer of glucose and a component of starch

entities.name: COOKING QUALITY
entities.description: The quality of rice during and after cooking, influenced by starch structure

entities.name: TEXTURAL QUALITY
entities.description: The physical texture of rice, influenced by starch composition

entities.name: STARCH SYNTHESIZING ENZYMES
entities.description: Enzymes whose isoforms control the synthesis and structure of starch

entities.name: STARCH STRUCTURE
entities.description: The arrangement of amylopectin chains, including length and distribution

entities.name: PHYSICOCHEMICAL PROPERTIES
entities.description: Physical and chemical characteristics of rice grain influenced by starch synthesis

entities.name: EATING QUALITY
entities.description: The sensory quality of rice when consumed

entities.name: GENE MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying the location of genes responsible for specific enzymes

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying quantitative trait loci associated with starch properties

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method using markers to select cultivars with desired traits

entities.name: ENDOSPERM
entities.description: The tissue in the rice grain where starch synthesis occurs

entities.name: AMYLOSE CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of amylose present in rice starch

entities.name: GELATINIZATION TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The temperature at which starch granules swell and lose their crystallinity

entities.name: ALLELIC PATTERN
entities.description: The specific combination of alleles that can be modified to regulate enzyme activity

relationships.description: is used to improve cultivars of
